caption: A person's hands are shown holding a decorative greeting card over a light-colored wooden surface. The card features a winter-themed design with a purple floral illustration, small snowflake accents, and the printed text, "You warm my heart". A thin, cream-colored ribbon is attached vertically to the left side of the card's front panel. The card is placed inside a clear plastic sleeve and is set against a dark blue background. To the left, a small portion of another similar card in a sleeve is visible. The person's hands hold the card steady, with the left hand grasping the side and the right hand's index finger pointing toward the center of the card. Throughout the sequence of frames, the hands and the card remain almost entirely stationary, with only very slight movements in the positioning of the fingers.
